topAlert.title: CISA: Microsoft SharePoint RCE flaw now actively exploited
topAlert.summary: CISA warned that attackers have begun exploiting a high-severity Microsoft SharePoint remote code execution vulnerability patched in May.
topAlert.recommendedAction: Review immediately. Check exposure, vendor advisories, patch status, SIEM/EDR alerts, and known indicators of compromise.
